case_title: MODESTO SANCHEZ PAIZ VS. PASTOR N. CHAVEZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY PAIZ, MODESTO SANCHEZ AS TO DEFENDANT CHAVEZ, PASTOR N. DBA DAYTONA AUTO REPAIR & PAINTING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-22-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAIZ, MODESTO SANCHEZ ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-03-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHAVEZ, PASTOR N. DBA DAYTONA AUTO REPAIR & PAINTING
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-22-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-22-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY ALL PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-22-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PAIZ, MODESTO SANCHEZ IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHAVEZ, PASTOR N. DBA DAYTONA AUTO REPAIR & PAINTING THE COURT DOES NOT AWARD MONEY DAMAGES. HOWEVER, PLAINTIFF MAY RECOVER HIS VEHICLE FROM DEFENDANT AND/OR EUROCAR SERVICE WITHOUT CHARGE OR LIEN. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
